acceptance_criteria: All 34 expanded-catalog weapon recipe files load without ERROR on all 5 MC versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2) during :runGametest.

Recipe ingredient tag serializer format is correct per MC target: flat {"tag":"..."} where FAPI accepts it; {"fabric:type":"fabric:tag","tag":"..."} or vanilla 1.21+ {"ingredient":{"tag":"..."}} wrapper for targets that require it.
A gametest or logged assertion confirms non-zero recipe counts per version after the fix.
Shared recipe source files under src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/ are unchanged or updated to canonical format, and per-version overlay files carry correct per-version ingredient format.

agents.task_title: Downscale 33 weapon textures to 16x16 + commit downscale script
acceptance_criteria: All 33 weapon texture PNG files in src/main/resources/assets/dndweapons/textures/item/ are exactly 16x16 pixels.
Each file is under 1 KB (consistent with a true 16x16 RGBA PNG, matching the pre-existing longsword.png at 0.1 KB).
Nearest-neighbor (point) downscaling is used so pixel-art fidelity is preserved -- no bicubic or bilinear blur.
The pre-existing longsword.png is not modified.
A post-processing script or Gradle task that performs the downscale is committed alongside the corrected PNG files so the pipeline is repeatable.
